base_context.description: The next run will be this leader/base config plus ONLY the JSON changes returned by the advisor.

expected_direction: increase net profit or PnL per exposure hour without worsening MAE
expected_effect: Should improve 1DTE average/worst MAE and exposure efficiency while preserving the proven 1DTE fallback edge. Main tradeoff is losing some profitable low-structure or weak-slope 1DTE winners; reject if total net profit falls below 98% of run_001 or 1DTE PnL retention is under 95%.
label: 1dte-local-quality-gate
rationale: This implements one legal Batch G fallback-profile experiment focused only on breakout_long_1dte. Removing 1DTE entirely would sacrifice about $1305 and still not fix the -527 global tail, so this tests a narrower local quality gate: require stronger ES trend/structure and cap 1DTE target distance. It avoids repeating failed no-0DTE fallback tightening and does not touch global vetoes or option-dependent VALID_0DTE profiles.
